titleStmt.title: SII 39.179: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 179. (A.R. No. 179 of 1916.) TIRUPPUKKUḺI, CONJEEVERAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. VIJAYARAGHAVAPERUMĀḶ TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN VĪRAGAṆḌAGOPĀLADĒVA-2ND YEAR.

summary.p: This inscription refers to the gift by king, of 3 vēli of land by Nuḷappiyāṟukiḻāṉ Vāḷavaṇḍāṉ Tiruvēṅgaḍa Saraṇālayaṉ to a dancing girl Aḍichchēripeṇḍi Bukkavaḷḷi, the daughter of Padiṉeṉbhūmi Māṉikkam for their maintenance of her generation together.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī virakaṇṭakopāla tevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 vatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattut tāmaṟkoṭṭattut tāmarnāṭṭut tiruppati
tiruppuṭkuḻi nāyaṉār vicaiyarākavap perumāḷ ceṉainātaṉ Olai nam Aṭiccerip peṇpayyakaḷil Aḻakapperumāḷāṉa patiṉeṉpūmi māṇi
kkattiṉ makaḷ Āḻvārāṉa pukkatuṟai valli māṇikkattukku nām cantāṉaccāmam kuṭuttapaṭiyāvatu nam vijayarāghavap perumāḷukku Amutupaṭi
cāttuppaṭikku nuḷappiyāṟu kiḻāṉ vāḻavantāṉ tiruveṅkaṭa caraṇālaiya maṉaiyiṭuvittu nam virakaṇṭa kopālaṉai veṇṭik koṇṭu tam
muṭaiya jammanakṣatramāṉa Uttirattile titdhamāka tirunāḷ Eḻuntaruḷukiṟa Ivaṟku Intak kaṭṭaṉūrait tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamāka muṉpe Uṅkaḷ tiruttavappa
ṉār vijayakaṇṭakopāla tevar Udakam paṇṇiṉār Ummuṭaiya tirumukaṅkuṭuttaruḷa veṇumeṉṟu vāṅkuvittut tantu Ikkaṭṭaṉūrait tiru
viṭaiyāṭṭamāka viṭuvittapaṭiyāle Ivaṉ cantāṉa cantāṉa muḷḷataṉaikkun nāḷoṉṟukkuk kalamāka nellu munnūṟṟu Aṟupatiṉ kalatti
le Aṟupatiṉ kala nellukku Aiñcil Iraṇṭuppaṭi nāḷoṉṟukku Aṟunāḻi prasādamum nūṟṟukkala nellu māta viḻukkāṭṭile peṟavu
m nikki nellu Irunūṟṟuk kalattukkum Ivvūrile mūṉṟu velinilam Iṭuvittuk koṇṭu Innilam neṟpayiṟ ceytu kaṭamai koṇṭu nik
ki Ūrvarikaḷum poṉvari puṟakkalaṉaiyum maṟṟum Epperpaṭṭaṉavum Āmaiñciyumakappaṭa Ūropāti ceytu Ikkoyilait tāṉ cantāṉa cantā
ṉamākanokki Iccantāṉaccāmam peṟuvārkaḷākak kuṭuttom [.]
Digital edition of SII 39.179 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
